news.t: IndexIQ Adds to Fast-Growing ESG ETF Suite with Two New Funds

holdings.infoBox: IQSM is an equity ETF with a total of 242 individual holdings. The top holdings are Revolution Medicines stock at 1.17%, nVent Electric at 1.15%, TechnipFMC at 1.12%, Twilio at 1.08%, and Sterling Infrastructure at 1.05%.

overview.description: The NYLI Candriam U.S. Mid Cap Equity ETF (IQSM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYLI Candriam U.S. Mid Cap Equity index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that provides exposure to US mid-cap stocks that meet environmental, social, and corporate governance criteria. IQSM was launched on Oct 25, 2022 and is issued by New York Life Investments.
infoTable: NYLI Candriam U.S. Mid Cap Equity Index
